arts.ttl: Fulham vs Southampton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Fulham take on bottom-of-the-table Southampton in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Fulham receive transfer proposal for 'untouchable' Andreas Pereira
arts.sum: Fulham receive an 'initial proposal' from South American giants Palmeiras over a potential deal to sign midfielder Andreas Pereira.

arts.ttl: Southampton confirm Ivan Juric appointment: Will the 49-year-old be in charge vs. Fulham?
arts.sum: Southampton confirm the appointment of former Roma head coach Ivan Juric as their new manager following the departure of Russell Martin.

arts.ttl: Ivan Juric makes ‘aggressive’ promise following Southampton appointment
arts.sum: Ivan Juric has outlined what to expect from his Southampton side after he was officially unveiled as manager on Saturday. The 49-year-old succeeds Russell Martin in the dugout with the club bottom of the Premier League table on five points having won one game out of 16. The Saints travel to Craven Cottage to take […] The post Ivan Juric makes ‘aggressive’ promise following Southampton appointment first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Club’s president an ‘asset’ as they chase Fulham star – Formed ‘closeness’ with player earlier this year
arts.sum: Andreas Pereira’s good relationship with Palmeiras president Leila Pereira is seen as key to the Brazilian side’s hopes of signing him in January. That’s according to UOL, who say Leila has become the club’s ‘asset’ as they try to get the midfielder out of Fulham. arts.ttl: Southampton appoint Juric as new manager
arts.sum: Southampton appoint ex-Roma boss Ivan Juric as their new manager on an 18-month deal.

arts.ttl: Southampton name Russell Martin replacement in bid to avoid Premier League relegation
arts.sum: Southampton have replaced Russell Martin with ex-Roma boss Ivan Juric, who has the tricky task of trying to turn around the fortunes of the Premier League's bottom side

arts.ttl: Southampton name Ivan Juric as new head coach
arts.sum: Southampton confirmed the hiring of Ivan Juric as their new head coach on Saturday ahead of their clash with Fulham on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Southampton close to appointing Juric as manager
arts.sum: Southampton are said to be close to appointing Croatian former Roma boss Ivan Juric as their manager.

arts.ttl: Fulham star has given green light to exit negotiations – Feels valued by suitors, open to all offers
arts.sum: Neither Fulham nor Andreas Pereira are yet to respond to the offer from Palmeiras, but the player des feel ‘valued’ by the Brazilian club. That’s according to journalist André Hernan, who reports that the initial offer from Palmeiras does not include a player swap for the time being.
